title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXLVIII. Relics.
content:
Go to bed, Tom!
        Go to bed, Tom!
        Drunk or sober,
        Go to bed, Tom!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DCXLVIII. Relics.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
